narrative: | Each ruling in the trading card game is assigned a unique integer identifier to ensure precise reference and organization of the official game rules and clarifications. (Hash: 4990b0c6469246cb) | | The official clarification for the trading card game card was issued on 2007-07-15, marking an important update in game rules. (Hash: 29f8c5988ad04da9) | | In the game, remember that you draw the card when Bandage resolves, not when the damage is actually prevented. (Hash: 4afc2c5770684ead) | | Each official game rule and clarification is uniquely identified by its uuid, such as 6d268c95-c176-5766-9a46-c14f739aba1c, for precise retrieval. (Hash: 7fc33b0477114e4e) |
